title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Although we were the ones running !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This whole place is falling apart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But in order to be absolutely safe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I need to eliminate those brats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The explosion should reach even the tanker

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Take it all down with you...

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
